category_title: Visually impaired child with profound and multiple learning difficulties (PMLD) and low initiation rates
minimal_context: Leah is participating in an afternoon activity while sitting in her wheelchair at 5pm.
dialogue:
TUTOR: It is 5pm, let's continue with our afternoon activity.

STUDENT: (Sits in her wheelchair and frowns) Ah.

TUTOR: Let's keep trying.

STUDENT: (Continues frowning) Ah. Ah.

TUTOR: Just a little bit more to do.

STUDENT: (Frowns as her vocalizations become louder and more persistent) Ah! Ah! Ah!

options.A: Deliver 12 hour-long sessions, scheduled twice-weekly, of a mindfulness intervention program for the student.
options.B: Use SCERTS checklists to identify opportunities to support the student's communication and improve the staff's interpersonal and learning supports.
options.C: Fade the instructional prompts gradually over the course of the student's afternoon activities.
options.D: Use game activities to create a positive attitude about the afternoon tasks during the sessions.
